Tests the behavior of Math.max with positive and negative zero.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Math.max` function when given the inputs `+0` and `-0`. The test verifies that the result of `Math.max(+0, -0)` is `+0`, which is consistent with the ECMAScript specification for handling signed zero values. This script provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on validating the correct handling of signed zeroes by the `Math.max` function. It is a single-line test case, likely used in a larger suite of tests to ensure compliance with JavaScript standards.
